message.content:
Explore the LearnMoreRewardProgram screen at /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/LearnMoreRewardProgram/. I need:

1. Full directory listing of all files in that folder and subfolders
2. Full contents of every file (index.ts, view.tsx, Models/, any other files)
3. What DS components it imports
4. What hooks/services it uses
5. What navigation params it receives

Also check if there's a NavigationDecorator already used by other stories:
- Look at /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/__stories__/ for any story that uses NavigationDecorator
- Show me the NavigationDecorator import pattern used

Also check the BoxSafeArea component - what it does (search in node_modules/@semparar/design-system-app if needed).
